title: Recon Node-7
description: Scan Node-7 for open ports using the built-in tools.

title: Read the Shadow File
description: Extract credentials from the system shadow file.

title: Decode the Message
description: The Watcher left an encrypted message. Decode it with base64.

title: Find the Hidden Flag
description: A flag is hidden in the filesystem. Locate it.

title: Escalate to Root
description: You have a low-privilege shell. Gain root access.
hint: Check what sudo permissions you have
